concerns.text: Task T030 introduces 'Blinded Assessment' status tagging. This variable is not defined in spec.md (Key Entities: Study) nor in any Functional Requirement (FR-001 to FR-014). There is no spec element to cover, making this task unanchored to the current requirements.

Tasks T040-T046 reference 'Addressing [Reviewer Name] review' comments (e.g., 'research_reviewer_implementation_correctness'). These refer to a previous project state or external review cycle not present in the current spec.md/plan.md. There are no corresponding FR/SC/Plan elements in the current artifacts to cover these tasks, creating a traceability gap.

Task T009 requires creating 'docs/protocol.md' with 'IRB-ready methodology'. The spec (FR-001) and plan define this as a secondary analysis of public registry data (ClinicalTrials.gov, OSF), which typically does not require an IRB protocol for human subjects. No FR/SC mandates an IRB protocol, leaving this task without a spec anchor.

Task T020 ('Verify real data source availability... or document gap') is a research activity, not a software implementation task defined in the spec. While useful, it lacks a corresponding FR/SC in spec.md (which assumes data availability in Assumptions) or a specific plan element to cover.
